items.name_en: CHANEL❄️ 24s Everyone's Obsessed Camera Bag AS4817 The details are exquisite. The metal lens cap can be opened. Overall, it looks more premium. How can such a delicate and small bag look so good~ The small camera shape has a retro, high-end luxury feel without losing a playful vibe. It's too practical for girls. Dimensions: 11.5 x 16 x 6cm
